title: Raw Ct values obtained from RT-qPCR experiments performed to study different genes related to cell cycle regulation, proliferation, apoptosis and senescence in early-passage and late-passage equine induced mesenchymal stem/stromal cells and in early-passage and late-passage equine bone marrow-derived mesenchymal stem/stromal cells
author: Serrano Pastor, Belén
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains the raw cycle threshold (Ct) values obtained from Real-Time Quantitative PCR (RT-qPCR) experiments performed to study different genes related to cell cycle regulation, proliferation, apoptosis and senescence in early-passage and late-passage equine induced mesenchymal stem/stromal cells (n = 3) and in early-passage and late-passage equine bone marrow-derived mesenchymal stem/stromal cells (n = 3). Genes evaluated were  Cyclin D2  ( CCDN2 ),  Cyclooxygenase 1  ( COX1 ),  cyclin dependent kinase inhibitor 1A  ( CDKN1A ),  TP53 regulating kinase  ( TP53RK ),  galactosidase beta 1  ( GLB1 ),  BCL2 associated X   apoptosis regulator  ( BAX ),  caspase 8  ( CASP8 ),  BCL2 apoptosis regulator  ( BCL-2 ),  BCL2 like 1  ( BCL2L1 ) and  heat shock protein 27  ( HSP27 ).
steps_raw: This dataset contains the raw cycle threshold (Ct) values obtained from Real-Time Quantitative PCR (RT-qPCR) experiments performed to study different genes related to cell cycle regulation, proliferation, apoptosis and senescence in early-passage and late-passage equine induced mesenchymal stem/stromal cells (n = 3) and in early-passage and late-passage equine bone marrow-derived mesenchymal stem/stromal cells (n = 3). Genes evaluated were  Cyclin D2  ( CCDN2 ),  Cyclooxygenase 1  ( COX1 ),  cyclin dependent kinase inhibitor 1A  ( CDKN1A ),  TP53 regulating kinase  ( TP53RK ),  galactosidase beta 1  ( GLB1 ),  BCL2 associated X   apoptosis regulator  ( BAX ),  caspase 8  ( CASP8 ),  BCL2 apoptosis regulator  ( BCL-2 ),  BCL2 like 1  ( BCL2L1 ) and  heat shock protein 27  ( HSP27 ).
